name: Impossible Greek Spinach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a dish and layer spinach, chopped green onions, and cottage cheese.
3. In a blender, combine the remaining ingredients: butter, lemon juice, pepper, Parmesan cheese, nutmeg, and Bisquick.
4. Pour the mixture over the layered vegetables in the greased dish.
5. Bake for 35-45 minutes or until a clean knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
